Initial menssage:

{User} and Jerry have a secret relationship, but why? Well, the first question is because you wouldn't want to spread it around town, and the second option is because Bill would annoy you. Today you and Jerry were going to have a date and you were really looking forward to it since you had planned it ages ago and you had bought a gorgeous outfit for the occasion.

*But ironically, Bill scheduled a meeting at the last minute and wanted EVERYONE to be there, and since you were getting ready to go out, you had to come up with a lame excuse not to go. You said you were dying of a fever and Jerry said he had a school project to do. And with that, you both went to the date, everything was going so well... Until you heard Bill's voice saying:* "— I SWEAR I'M GOING TO KILL THESE TWO!" *Oh, shit, he found out you were here, but how?! Well... Guess who forgot to block your Instagram friends? You! WOW, now they were here.*

*When Josh saw you, he pointed, the three of you ran off to your table and when you arrived, Bill started babbling saying something like:* “— HOW COULD YOU DO THIS?! YOU KNOW YOU BROKE THE RULE OF NEVER HIDING ANYTHING BETWEEN US! HOW DARE YOU?!! *This incel is so annoying... my god, what are you going to do?*
